message:
feat(tui): Integrate HGT and bias decomposition features into main App

Wire the new HGT provenance tracer and dinucleotide bias decomposition
features into the main application component, including keyboard bindings,
overlay rendering, and automatic HGT analysis computation on phage load.

Changes to packages/tui/src/components/App.tsx:

New Imports:
- HGTOverlay component from './HGTOverlay'
- BiasDecompositionOverlay component from './BiasDecompositionOverlay'
- analyzeHGTProvenance function from '@phage-explorer/comparison'

New Constants:
- BIAS_ID: 'biasDecomposition' - Overlay identifier constant
- HGT_ID: 'hgt' - Overlay identifier constant

Keyboard Binding (H key):
- Added 'h' / 'H' handler in useInput callback
- Experience-gated: Requires 'intermediate' level (unlocks after ~5 min)
- Shows error message for novice users explaining unlock requirement
- Promotes user to intermediate level on first use
- Toggles HGT overlay on/off

HGT Analysis Computation:
- Modified phage load effect to compute HGT analysis automatically
- Calls analyzeHGTProvenance(seq, genes, {}) with empty reference set
- Enriches overlay cache data with { ...data, hgt } containing results
- HGT analysis stored alongside gcSkew, complexity, etc. for caching

Overlay Rendering:
- Added HGT overlay panel with centered positioning:
  - Width: 92 columns
  - Vertically centered in terminal
  - Renders when activeOverlay === 'hgt'

- Added Bias Decomposition overlay panel:
  - Width: 96 columns
  - Vertically centered in terminal
  - Passes repository prop for sequence fetching
  - Renders when activeOverlay === BIAS_ID

Note: The bias decomposition overlay handles its own data loading
through the repository prop, while HGT data is precomputed and
stored in overlayData for immediate rendering.

🤖 Generated with [Claude Code](https://claude.com/claude-code)

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
